name: Security Audit Pipeline
description: Four-node pipeline that scans for vulnerabilities, analyzes findings, performs deep dive if issues found (otherwise skips), and generates a report. Demonstrates conditional branching.

nodes.description: Run a quick automated security scan across the codebase. Look for common vulnerabilities: hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, XSS, insecure deserialization, misconfigurations.
nodes.prompt_template: Perform a quick security scan of the codebase for: hardcoded secrets, SQL injection vectors, XSS vulnerabilities, insecure deserialization, and common misconfigurations. Focus areas: {{input.task}}

nodes.description: Perform a deep-dive security analysis on vulnerabilities found in the quick scan. Only runs if critical or high-severity issues were detected.
nodes.prompt_template: Perform a detailed deep-dive security analysis on the vulnerabilities found. Vulnerabilities: {{parent.quick-scan.output.data.vulnerabilities}}. Severity breakdown: {{parent.quick-scan.output.data.severity_counts}}. Conduct manual code review, trace attack paths, and assess business impact.

nodes.description: Create a prioritized remediation plan for all confirmed vulnerabilities. Runs regardless of scan outcome.
nodes.prompt_template: Create a prioritized remediation plan for the security findings. {{#if parent.quick-scan.output.data.severity_counts.critical}}Critical issues found: {{parent.quick-scan.output.data.severity_counts.critical}}{{/if}}. Deep-dive findings: {{parent.deep-dive.output.data.detailed_findings}}. Prioritize by severity, exploitability, and business impact.

nodes.description: Generate a comprehensive security audit report. Contains executive summary, findings, and remediation plan.
nodes.prompt_template: Generate a comprehensive security audit report. Executive summary: Based on scan of {{input.task}}. Key findings: {{parent.quick-scan.output.data.vulnerabilities}}. Remediation: {{parent.remediation-plan.output.data.remediation_steps}}. Include: executive summary, methodology, findings by severity, detailed analysis, remediation roadmap, and appendix.
